title: Willham Burke

{{Quote|You'll be serving under Admiral Willham Burke. You may have heard of him. He's commander of the Fourth Battle Group stationed in the Outer Rim, two time recipient of the Alliance Medal of Valor, and one of the finest field commanders in the business.|[[General/Legends|General]] [[Ufwol]], to a Rebel pilot|<ref name="SWG:JtL" />}}
'''Willham Burke''' was the [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] of the [[Fourth Battle Group (Rebel Alliance)|Fourth Battle Group]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], operating in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. He later served as a commander in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[New Republic Third Fleet|Third Fleet]], winning numerous victories in the years immediately following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|The Alliance has decided that it is time to try to make a strike at the Outer Rim. We believe that the Empire is stretched too thin to adequately defend all of its positions in these systems. Our first goal is to take Kessel.|Admiral Willham Burke, to a Rebel pilot|<ref name="SWG:JtL" />}}
He was considered a very competent commander, and many [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] pilots took it as a great honor to meet him. He was known to help train several pilot squadrons including [[Havoc Squadron]], [[Vortex Squadron]], [[Crimson Phoenix Squadron]], as well as freelancers from [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]] and the [[Smugglers' Alliance]]. Soon after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] he was known to be seen in a hotel in [[Doaba Guerfel/Legends|Doaba Guerfel]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. While there, he assigned a single individual to [[Battle of Kessel (1 ABY)|battle]] against 30 [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] near [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]], and eventually a follow-up assault against the Imperial [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[Star Ravager]]''.<ref name="SWG:JtL" />

In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] placed command of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Third Fleet|Third Fleet]] temporarily in the hands of Admirals Burke and [[Kalback]], who worked to sever the forces of Imperial [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Treuten Teradoc]] from the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. Leading the fleet from the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruisers]] [[Remember Alderaan (Star Cruiser)|''Remember Alderaan'']] and [[Justice (MC80 Star Cruiser)|''Justice'']], the pair bested the warlord's task force at [[Togoria/Legends|Togoria]] and fought their way to the planet [[Lantillies/Legends|Lantillies]] on the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]], where they connected with the forces fielded by the planet [[Contruum/Legends|Contruum]]. Having established a hold on the Perlemian, the two admirals headed in different directions; while Kalback headed for [[Corsin/Legends|Corsin]], Burke pressed Coreward, encountering the forces of Admiral [[Ledre Okins]] in the [[Chazwa system/Legends|Chazwa system]]. The two engaged in a long series of feints and raids before Burke's trickery convinced Okins to send key ships to the [[Pindra system/Legends|Pindra system]], where they were caught in a [[grav trap]] hidden in the system's careening asteroids. Burke was able to destroy Okins at the latter's base of operations in the [[Colla system/Legends|Colla system]].<ref name="TEGtW" />

In [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], Burke and [[General/Legends|General]] [[Brenn Tantor]] captured [[Reytha]], [[Gyndine/Legends|Gyndine]], and [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]], placing him in position to move into the Core, along with Admiral [[Firmus Nantz]] of the [[New Republic First Fleet|First Fleet]] and Admiral [[Chel Dorat]] of the [[New Republic Fourth Fleet|Fourth Fleet]].<ref name="TEGtW" />
